---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new language feature or CLI improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed syntax / API

If this is a language feature, show what the syntax would look like:

```nexa
// Example of the proposed syntax
```

If this is a CLI feature, show the proposed command:

```bash
nexa <command> [options]
```

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to achieve the same result today?

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or prior art that would help.
